items.name: Sarah Cohen
items.content: Elad delivered an exceptional web application that exceeded our expectations. His attention to detail and technical expertise in React and Next.js made the development process smooth and efficient.

items.name: David Levi
items.content: Working with Elad on our educational platform was a great experience. He brought creative solutions to complex problems and delivered a high-quality product on time.

items.name: Maya Shapira
items.content: Elad combines strong technical skills with excellent communication. He understood our business needs and translated them into a beautiful, functional application.

items.name: Yoni Berger
items.content: The portfolio website Elad built for us is both visually stunning and incredibly fast. His use of modern technologies like Three.js and Framer Motion added a premium feel to the project.

experience.title: Experience & Expertise
experience.intro: Over the years, I've developed a variety of projects:
experience.haderech: HaDerech - A complete interactive learning platform with course systems, community forums, and practice simulators. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, Supabase, and AI integrations.
experience.cms: Customer Management Systems - Business applications for managing clients and tasks with Angular and JavaScript
experience.tools: Useful Tools - Like an interactive Hebrew-Gregorian calendar
experience.expertise: My main expertise is in Next.js, React, TypeScript, Node.js, and Supabase, but I'm also proficient in Angular, PostgreSQL, and working with modern APIs.
experience.beyond: Beyond technology, my experience as a creator, content developer, and businessman taught me to listen to clients, understand real needs, and build solutions that work not just technically, but also from a business perspective.

maturity.title: Maturity & Life Experience
maturity.description: Professional and responsible approach to projects

selfLearning.title: Self-Learning
selfLearning.description: Always up-to-date with the latest technologies

creative.title: Creative Thinking
creative.description: Out-of-the-box solutions thanks to multidisciplinary background

results.title: Results-Oriented
results.description: Focus on what matters, not on hours worked

lookingFor.title: What I'm Looking For
lookingFor.p1: I'm seeking opportunities to work on interesting and challenging projects - whether it's SaaS development, interactive applications, or complex business systems.
lookingFor.p2: I'm particularly interested in projects in education, social tech, and developing tools that help people grow.
lookingFor.p3: If you're looking for an experienced and responsible developer who brings not just technical knowledge, but also business vision and creative thinking - I'd love to hear from you.

projectsPage.title: Projects
projectsPage.subtitle: A collection of projects showcasing full-stack development, AI integration, and creative problem solving.

haderech.title: HaDerech - Learning Platform
haderech.description: A complete interactive learning platform with course systems, quizzes, certificates, community forums, and practice simulators. Features admin panel, analytics dashboard, and real-time progress tracking.

portfolio.title: Full-Stack Portfolio
portfolio.description: This very website! A modern developer portfolio with 3D hero scene, MDX blog, i18n (Hebrew/English), contact form, SEO optimization, and dark mode support.

eyAiKids.title: EY.AI Kids Playground
eyAiKids.description: An AI-powered children's book creation platform. Features a 4-step wizard, parental controls, child safety content filtering, and age-appropriate story generation.

omanut.title: Omanut HaKesher
omanut.description: A professional website for a relationship coaching business. Features blog with articles, contact form, testimonials, WhatsApp integration, and full RTL Hebrew support.

edutech.title: EduTech Platform
edutech.description: A comprehensive educational technology platform with course management, student analytics, interactive content delivery, and instructor dashboards.

hebrewCalendar.title: Hebrew-Gregorian Calendar
hebrewCalendar.description: An interactive calendar tool converting between Hebrew and Gregorian dates. Features holiday information, date calculations, and a clean user interface.

ninjaKeyboard.title: Ninja Keyboard
ninjaKeyboard.description: A Hebrew-first PWA teaching kids ages 6-16 to type. Features touch typing lessons, keyboard shortcuts training, gamification with levels, and 5 age-based visual themes.

bayitBeseder.title: Bayit BeSeder
bayitBeseder.description: A home maintenance management app with task scheduling, notifications, gamification, and progress tracking. Built with Next.js, Supabase, and PWA support.

kidushishi.title: Kidushishi Management
kidushishi.description: A management application for event coordination with map integration, real-time data sync, and comprehensive dashboard analytics.

voiceChat.title: Voice Chat with Claude
voiceChat.description: A real-time voice conversation interface with Claude AI. Features push-to-talk, continuous mode, wake word detection, VAD, and WebSocket streaming.

zehutai.title: ZehutAI - Hebrew NLP
zehutai.description: A Natural Language Processing system optimized for Hebrew text. Features RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation), entity recognition, and sentiment analysis.

whatsappAutomation.title: WhatsApp Automation
whatsappAutomation.description: A TypeScript library for WhatsApp automation. Features message scheduling, auto-replies, contact management, and comprehensive API integration.

aiToolsPage.title: AI Tools & Services
aiToolsPage.subtitle: Exploring the AI ecosystem I use to build smarter, faster, and more creative applications.

claude.title: Claude AI
claude.description: Anthropic's advanced reasoning model for complex code analysis, architecture decisions, and deep problem-solving.

openai.title: OpenAI GPT
openai.description: Versatile language model powering content generation, conversational AI, and multi-modal applications.

langchain.title: LangChain
langchain.description: Framework for building context-aware AI pipelines with chains, agents, and retrieval-augmented generation.

supabaseAi.title: Supabase AI
supabaseAi.description: Vector storage and semantic search powered by pgvector, enabling similarity-based retrieval at scale.

vercelAiSdk.title: Vercel AI SDK
vercelAiSdk.description: Streaming-first toolkit for building AI-powered React interfaces with edge-ready server components.

huggingFace.title: Hugging Face
huggingFace.description: Open-source model hub providing transformers, NLP pipelines, and fine-tuning capabilities for custom tasks.

codeGeneration.title: Code Generation
codeGeneration.description: Accelerating development with AI-assisted code generation, refactoring suggestions, and automated testing.

aiFeatures.title: AI-Powered Features
aiFeatures.description: Building intelligent features like semantic search, content recommendations, and natural language interfaces.

automation.title: Workflow Automation
automation.description: Automating repetitive tasks, CI/CD pipelines, and content workflows with AI agents and scripts.

codeReview.title: AI-Powered Code Review
codeReview.description: See how AI identifies issues and suggests improvements in real-time.

smartSearch.title: Keyword vs Semantic Search
smartSearch.description: Compare traditional keyword matching with AI-driven semantic understanding.

contentGeneration.description: From a simple prompt to polished copy in seconds.
